description: The creator explicitly pairs Charjabug with a Hydro Cannon user (cannon), using Lickilicky as the flexible safe swap around this duo.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best SUMMER CUP Teams | Top RANKED SUMMER CUP POKEMON | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: The 'double dragon' back-line — both are dragons that resist Incinerate, so pairing them lets you double-resist common threats. Kingdra tanks and absorbs energy to protect the glassy Drampa, which then sweeps as a closer with dragon-typing offense.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: DOUBLE DRAGON MAKES Summer Cup EASY

description: The front two of the team apply relentless debuffs — Sand Tomb and Rock Tomb from Forretress plus Brick Break from Furret — softening opponents defensively and offensively before Toxapex walls them out.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: I think I just found the BEST TEAM for the Summer Cup Meta!

description: The creator highlights Furret and Jellicent as two Pokémon that pair very well together and are both very strong, forming the safe backbone behind Drampa.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best SUMMER CUP Teams | Top RANKED SUMMER CUP POKEMON | Pokemon GO Battle League

description: Ninetales and Furret form a great front core in the 'ABB electric' bait team. Furret is used to bait out the opposing grass/Cradily since it naturally loses to Cradily.

description: A Kingdra + Marowak lead pairing the creator is considering for a Cradily-less team, though he notes it is very weak to Forretress.
